betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Uranium-238§f is the most common uranium isotope in HBM's Nuclear Tech.

§eUses:§f
• §bFerrouranium§f alloy production
• §bMOX fuel§f (Mixed Oxide) for reactors
• §bDepleted Uranium ammunition§f - armor-piercing rounds
• §bWatz absorber pellets§f
• Conversion to §bSchrabidium§f in §bExposure Chamber§f (with Higgs Boson)

§eObtaining:§f
• Standard uranium ore processing
• Gas Centrifuge byproduct (primary output)
• Nuclear fuel reprocessing

§aTip:§f Don't discard U-238 - it has many valuable applications.
